title: Trump Sought an Iran War Exit. Putin Pushed On in Ukraine. Now Both Are Stuck.
summary_full: The Iran and Ukraine wars underline the common limits of military force in achieving political ends, but also the differences between a dug-in Russian president and a vacillating American one.
summary_public: The Iran and Ukraine wars underline the common limits of military force in achieving political ends, but also the differences between a dug-in Russian president and a vacillating American one.
